== Notes for [[Item:Q101144|Q101144]] ==

[http://berdichevsky.tribalpages.com/family-tree/berdichevsky/1195/469/Yosef-HaLevi-Family '''Berdichevsky-Sokolka Families Tree - Yosef HaLevi Family''']
--------------------
'''Redundant, recently duplicated profile with no added information. Should not have been created in the first place! Better be eliminated!!!'''

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9C80811EFBBFA9822EF79916C0392
geni:6000000003933499315

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
